description: Goal: make the work loop report its real terminal state directly. Signal: drive returns Resolved when the agenda drains with no unresolved waiters, Unresolved with the blocked frontier when the agenda drains with missing facts, and Fatal when a job dies. Strategy: inspect the existing wait graph instead of inventing a second status mechanism; expose the unresolved frontier through the drive outcome and cover root-before-code plus later resolution in telemetry-driven tests.
title: Compiler2 drive: report unresolved frontier at quiescence
